schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,500/month pension for all Goa residents aged 18+ below poverty line
schemes.eligibility: Goa domicile, BPL, aged 18+, not receiving other pension

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,500/month to housewife of Goa domicile family for household support
schemes.benefit_hi: गोवा डोमिसाइल परिवार की गृहिणी को ₹2,500/माह घरेलू सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Married women with Goa domicile, family income < Rs 3 lakh/month

schemes.benefit_en: Financial support for Goa farmers affected by weather/crop failure
schemes.benefit_hi: गोवा किसानों को मौसम/फसल नुकसान पर वित्तीय सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Registered Goa farmers with verifiable crop loss

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 5,000 grant for marriage of BPL girl child in Goa
schemes.benefit_hi: गोवा BPL बालिका के विवाह पर ₹5,000 अनुदान
